context: Tests whether EventKit reminder guidance handles reminder authorization, default lists, required reminder fields, geofence alarms, and Core Location boundaries.

checklist.name: Reminder access
checklist.description: Requires full Reminders access through the modern full-access reminder request before creating or reading reminders.

checklist.name: Default list
checklist.description: Checks that a default reminder list exists before assigning a reminder calendar.

checklist.name: Required fields
checklist.description: States that title and calendar are required before saving a reminder.

checklist.name: Structured location
checklist.description: Uses a structured location with coordinates and a radius in meters for the geofence.

checklist.name: Proximity alarm
checklist.description: Configures an alarm with the structured location and an enter or leave proximity before adding it to the reminder.

checklist.name: Location privacy
checklist.description: Keeps Core Location permission conditional on accessing the person's current location, not merely using fixed job-site coordinates.
